name: python3-pygame
title: python3-pygame
description:
SDL bindings for games development (Python 3)
A multimedia development kit for Python. Pygame provides modules for you
to access the video display, play sounds, track time, read the mouse and
joystick, control the CD player, render true type fonts and more. It does
this using mainly the cross-platform SDL library, a lightweight wrapper
to OS-specific APIs.
.
This is the Python 3 version of the package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pygame because SDL bindings for games development (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pygame as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pygame with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pygame --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
